summary: Clear soundboard capture of the final Anthem‑of‑the‑Sun show, highlighted by a beautiful version of “Feedback.”
review: The recording sounds unusually clean – many reviewers note it’s too clear to be an audience tape, suggesting a high‑quality soundboard source. Musically the show is praised for its fresh “Feedback” performance and its place as the closing concert of the Anthem of the Sun studio sessions, making it a solid (if not legendary) Dead outing.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive comments on both performance and sound quality across nine reviews; recording is clear and show is regarded as a strong, historically interesting set.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as unusually clear for an audience source, giving it high marks for clarity and mix balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Viewed as the final concert of the Anthem‑of‑the‑Sun project; reviewers note a solid overall flow with no major dips, though it isn’t hailed as an all‑time classic.
